title: SEISMIC RESISTANCE OF ENGINEERING SYSTEMS OF BUILDINGS
publisher: Azerbaijan University of Architecture and Construction
abstract: Abstract. The seismic resistance of a structure is ensured both by the choice of a seismically favorable construction site, and by the development of the most rational structural and planning schemes for the structure, special design measures that increase the strength and solidity of the supporting structures, creating the possibility of developing plastic deformations in structural elements and nodes, significantly increasing the resistance of structures to action seismic forces. Of great importance for improving the seismic resistance of structures is the high quality of building materials and works. This article outlines the general requirements for engineering systems of buildings under construction in earthquake-prone areas. Keywords: seismic resistance, engineering systems, earthquake-prone area, fastening pipelines
